title: Mint Hoops
description: A 60-second arcade basketball score attack with drag-to-shoot controls, combo multipliers, and a three-point finale.

prompt.objective: Build a one-minute arcade basketball score attack with satisfying drag-to-shoot controls.

mintAssets.brief: A game-ready basketball, portable hoop, and fieldhouse wall mark in one cohesive stylized pack.

experience: Drag the ball to set launch direction and power, then release to shoot.
Reward consecutive baskets with escalating multipliers and a final three-point phase.
Pause, mute, replay, and support the same core interaction on pointer and touch.
prompt.visualDirection: Dark fieldhouse shell framing a warm court with mint, lime, charcoal, and playful broadcast graphics.

thumbnail.alt: Mint Hoops fieldhouse with a basketball aimed at a lime-trimmed hoop

social.title: Mint Hoops
social.description: Sink baskets, build a multiplier, and chase the final three-point phase in a 60-second fieldhouse run.

image.alt: Mint Hoops arcade basketball game inside a bright Mint fieldhouse
